projects.title: Pagerly
projects.description: Manage Oncalls, Rotations, Incidents and Tasks on Slack/Teams with Ease
features: Connect third party integrations like pagerduty, opsgenie, Jira, etc. to your Pagerly account.
Create and manage oncalls and rotations by creating a team based on oncall schedule, tasks or sync schedule from third party integration.
Ability to group multiple oncall teams together.
Built a calendar UI to view oncalls and rotations.
Raise rotation cover request, override oncall and swap rotation.
Create and manage incidents, escalation layers and tasks.

projects.title: Syncmygroup
projects.description: Automatically sync groups, teams and users  between different tools like  Google, Slack, Github, Jira, Hubspot, HR Tools etc
features: Connect third party integrations like pagerduty, opsgenie, Jira, etc. to your Pagerly account.
Create your own team workflows between different workspaces.
Replicate data from one workspace into multiple workspaces.
Manage individual user status across different workspaces.
Connect with github to manage users
Generate reports for your teams to get users status across different workspaces.

projects.title: Status Pages
projects.description: Maintain strong customer relationships during downtime with pretty Status Pages Our Status Pages—available in both public and private formats—provide an easy and effective way to keep customers informed during incidents. Host it on custom domain!
features: Their are 3 different types of status pages available: Third party monitor, Status page and Uptime monitor.
Monitor and track status of services that your org uses.
Host your status pages on a custom domain.
Public and private status pages available.
Raise notices for incidents and schedule maintenances updates.
Monitor and track your website or api's status using uptime monitor.
Analytics and reporting.

projects.title: PitchHere
projects.description: PitchHere is an investment platform that provides a one-stop for all startup needs. PitchHere provides a comprehensive suite of services for startups, including access to investors, mentorship programs, and various support services to help them thrive. With PitchHere, startups have a strong foundation to launch, scale, and become the next big success story.
features: Startup Investment platform developed using MERN stack, Redux, and Tailwind.
Implemented a real-time chat functionality using socket.io, resulting in a 30% increase in customer engagement.
Integrated Stripe payment gateway.
Implemented a real-time live video calling functionality using socket.io and Zoom API, resulting in a 60% increase in customer engagement.
Implemented Redux and Redux-persist to store data in a state and local storage respectively.
Created a complete wallet system with Razorpay as a payment gateway.

Launched a dynamic user marketplace with bidding functionality! Here, project owners can post details and budget for tasks, while skilled service providers compete for them by submitting bids. This fosters a competitive environment that drives quality and potentially lowers costs.

projects.title: userq.net
projects.description: This E-commerce platform specializes in the sale of Snapchat and Instagram accounts. Originally developed for an international client, the website boasts a comprehensive admin portal. Through this portal, administrators have full control over categories, products, and discounts, ensuring a seamless and tailored shopping experience for customers.
features: Integrated Paypal and Sadad payment gateway.
Integrated Twilo for sending sms.
Complete admin panel with ability to control categories, products and discount.
Responsive UI.

projects.title: Open Source Contribution
projects.description: Refactored Innovaccer's UI library by replacing the deprecated Dropdown component with the Select component, ensuring seamless integration and improved performance. Solving issue #2382
